name: shortcut-index
description: Offline searchable shortcut index for macOS, zsh, Ghostty, VS Code, and Codex CLI.
author: Moses Mbugua

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n site,electron -c cyan,green "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && vite build
scripts.icons: node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && iconutil -c icns build/icon.iconset -o build/icon.icns
scripts.package: npm run icons && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --dir
scripts.dist: npm run icons && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
